name: Dole's Pina Colada Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 3 packages (8 oz. each) cream cheese, softened
1/4 cup dark Jamaican Rum OR 2 tsp. rum extract
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix gelatin and 1/2 cup sugar in a saucepan. Add pineapple juice. Stand for 1 minute. Heat over low until gelatin dissolves (5 minutes). Remove from heat. Add yolks, one at a time, beat well after each. Cool slightly.
2. Beat cream cheese until fluffy. Blend in gelatin mixture with rum and coconut extract. Chill quickly by setting mixture over bowl of ice water; stir until slightly thickened.
3. Beat egg whites until foamy. Gradually add 1/4 cup sugar until stiff peaks form. Fold into gelatin. Turn into prepared crust. Refrigerate overnight.
4. In a saucepan, combine undrained pineapple with 2 tablespoons sugar and cornstarch. Cook, stirring until boils and thickens. Cool. Spoon over cheesecake. Serves 8 to 10.
5. Mix 1 1/2 cups vanilla wafer crumbs with 1 cup flaked coconut. Stir in 1/3 cup melted butter. Press in bottom and sides of 8 or 9-inch springform pan. Chill until ready to use.
